title: Harborline golden path UI
scope: Reworked the platform home surface around the Harborline Release Gate presenter path.
Added a one-click Harborline seed action using the existing deterministic demo endpoint.
Added direct navigation to the source Verification Record, blocked Release Gate, and passing Release Gate.
Expanded Release Gate detail with scenario_run_id, scenario results, and evidence references.
Added responsive styling and static-app regression tests.
acceptance: The first app screen presents the Harborline golden path instead of a generic queue-only dashboard.
Presenter can seed and open the fail/pass Release Gate path without hunting across tabs.
Release Gate detail shows evidence references and per-scenario result context.
No production/customer claim is added; Harborline remains demo-only.
